questions.template: Water flows through a pipe of area {a1} m² at {v1} m/s, then enters a section of area {a2} m². What is the speed in the second section?
A pipe narrows from radius {r1} m to {r2} m. If water enters at {v1} m/s, what speed does it exit?
Water enters a hose at {v1} m/s through area {a1} cm² and exits at {v2} m/s. What is the exit area?
A river of cross-section {a1} m² flows at {v1} m/s. It narrows to area {a2} m². What is the new flow speed?
